expectations.text: The output includes a valid JSON animation plan with scene, objects, motions, timeline, camera, and style fields
expectations.evidence: No JSON plan provided. Output is just a code snippet.

expectations.text: The output includes a complete Blender Python script using the bpy module
expectations.evidence: A basic Python script with bpy is provided inline in the markdown

expectations.text: The script creates a UV sphere with a red material
expectations.evidence: UV sphere is created but no material or color is applied — ball has default gray appearance

expectations.text: The script includes keyframe animation for bouncing (location changes on Z-axis)
expectations.evidence: Four keyframes with Z-axis location changes: 3 → 0.5 → 2 → 0.5

expectations.text: The script includes squash-and-stretch via scale keyframes
expectations.evidence: No scale keyframes at all — ball maintains uniform shape throughout

expectations.text: The script sets up a static side-view camera
expectations.evidence: No camera setup in the script — relies on Blender's default camera
No lighting added — uses Blender default (which may not exist after deleting all)

expectations.text: The script includes render output settings
expectations.evidence: Only frame_end is set; no output format, resolution, or filepath configured

expectations.text: The output includes instructions for how to run the script
expectations.evidence: Brief mention of 'run in Blender scripting tab or blender --python script.py'
